title: thisantha glabra
intro: Thisantha glabra, also known as the 'Yellow Bells' or 'Butterfly Bush', is a flowering shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thisantha glabra include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
